title: Byrdonis Nest
description:
You spot an enormous [jitter][red]Shambling Beast[/red][/jitter] chase off an injured [green][sine]Green Byrd[/sine][/green].

In the alcove the byrd fled from, a [gold]single unguarded egg[/gold] lies abandoned.

[sine]Your stomach gurgles...[/sine]
conditions: Haven't obtained an event pet yet
notes: Choosing to eat the egg grants 7 Max HP and ends the event. Choosing to take the egg adds the Byrdonis Egg card to your deck and ends the event with a different flavor message.
